verse.verse_1: Alif lām rā, tilka āyātul-kitābi wa qur'ānim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_2: Rubamā yawaddul-lażīna kafarū lau kānū muslimīn(a).
verse.verse_3: Żarhum ya'kulū wa yatamatta‘ū wa yulhihimul-amalu fa saufa ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_4: Wa mā ahlaknā min qaryatin illā wa lahā kitābum ma‘lūm(un).
verse.verse_5: Mā tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahā wa mā yasta'khirūn(a).
verse.verse_6: Wa qālū yā ayyuhal-lażī nuzzila ‘alaihiż-żikru innaka lamajnūn(un).
verse.verse_7: Lau mā ta'tīnā bil-malā'ikati in kunta minaṣ-ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_8: Mā nunazzilul-malā'ikata illā bil-ḥaqqi wa mā kānū iżam munẓarīn(a).
verse.verse_9: Innā naḥnu nazzalnaż-żikra wa innā lahū laḥāfiẓūn(a).
verse.verse_10: Wa laqad arsalnā min qablika fī syiya‘il-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_11: Wa mā ya'tīhim mir rasūlin illā kānū bihī yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_13: Lā yu'minūna bihī wa qad khalat sunnatul-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_14: Wa lau fataḥnā ‘alaihim bābam minas-samā'i fa ẓallū fīhi ya‘rujūn(a).
verse.verse_15: Laqālū innamā sukkirat abṣārunā bal naḥnu qaumum masḥūrūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Wa laqad ja‘alnā fis-samā'i burūjaw wa zayyannāhā lin-nāẓirīn(a).
verse.verse_17: Wa ḥafiẓnāhā min kulli syaiṭānir rajīm(in).
verse.verse_18: Illā manistaraqas-sam‘a fa atba‘ahū syihābum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_19: Wal-arḍa madadnāhā wa alqainā fīhā rawāsiya wa ambatnā fīhā min kulli syai'im mauzūn(in).
verse.verse_20: Wa ja‘alnā lakum fīhā ma‘āyisya  wa mal lastum lahū birāziqīn(a).
verse.verse_21: Wa im min syai'in illā ‘indanā khazā'inuhū wa mā nunazziluhū illā biqadarim ma‘lūm(un).
verse.verse_22: Wa arsalnar-riyāḥa lawāqiha fa anzalnā minas-samā'i mā'an fa asqainākumūh(u), wa mā antum lahū bikhāzinīn(a).
verse.verse_23: Wa innā lanaḥnu nuḥyī wa numītu wa naḥnul-wāriṡūn(a).
verse.verse_25: Wa inna rabbaka huwa yaḥsyuruhum, innahū ḥakīmun ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_26: Wa laqad khalaqnal-insāna min ṣalṣālim min ḥama'im masnūn(in).
verse.verse_27: Wal-jānna khalaqnāhu min qablu min nāris-samūm(i).
verse.verse_28: Wa iż qāla rabbuka lil-malā'ikati innī khāliqum basyaram min ṣalṣālim min ḥama'im masnūn(in).
verse.verse_29: Fa iżā sawwaituhū wa nafakhtu fīhi mir rūḥī fa qa‘ū lahū sājidīn(a).
verse.verse_31: Illā iblīs(a), abā ay yakūna ma‘as-sājidīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Qāla yā iblīsu mā laka allā takūna ma‘as-sājidīn(a).
verse.verse_33: Qāla lam akul li'asjuda libasyarin khalaqtahū min ṣalṣālim min ḥama'im masnūn(in).
verse.verse_34: Qāla fakhruj minhā fa innaka rajīm(un).
verse.verse_36: Qāla rabbi fa anẓirnī ilā yaumi yub‘aṡūn(a).
verse.verse_39: Qāla rabbi bimā agwaitanī la'uzayyinanna lahum fil-arḍi wa la'ugwiyannahum ajma‘īn(a).
verse.verse_42: Inna ‘ibādī laisa laka ‘alaihim sulṭānun illā manittaba‘aka minal-gāwīn(a).
verse.verse_44: Lahā sab‘atu abwāb(in), likulli bābim minhum juz'um maqsūm(un).
verse.verse_47: Wa naza‘nā mā fī ṣudūrihim min gillin ikhwānan ‘alā sururim mutaqābilīn(a).
verse.verse_48: Lā yamassuhum fīhā naṣabuw wa mā hum minhā bimukhrajīn(a).
verse.verse_52: Iż dakhalū ‘alaihi fa qālū salāmā(n), qāla innā minkum wajilūn(a).
verse.verse_53: Qālū lā taujal innā nubasysyiruka bigulāmin ‘alīm(in).
verse.verse_54: Qāla abasysyartumūnī ‘alā am massaniyal-kibaru fa bima tubasysyirūn(a).
verse.verse_55: Qālū basysyarnāka bil-ḥaqqi falā takum minal-qāniṭīn(a).
verse.verse_56: Qāla wa may yaqnaṭu mir raḥmati rabbihī illaḍ-ḍāllūn(a).
verse.verse_58: Qālū innā ursilnā ilā qaumim mujrimīn(a).
verse.verse_59: Illā āla lūṭ(in), innā lamunajjūhum ajma‘īn(a).
verse.verse_63: Qālū bal ji'nāka bimā kānū fīhi yamtarūn(a).
verse.verse_64: Wa ataināka bil-ḥaqqi wa innā laṣādiqūn(a).
verse.verse_65: Fa asri bi'ahlika biqiṭ‘im minal-laili wattabi‘ adbārahum wa lā yaltafit minkum aḥaduw wamḍū ḥaiṡu tu'marūn(a).
verse.verse_66: Wa qaḍainā ilaihi żālikal-amra anna dābira hā'ulā'i maqṭū‘um muṣbiḥīn(a).
verse.verse_68: Qāla inna hā'ulā'i ḍaifī falā tafḍaḥūn(i).
verse.verse_71: Qāla hā'ulā'i banātī in kuntum fā‘ilīn(a).
verse.verse_74: Fa ja‘alnā ‘āliyahā sāfilahā wa amṭarnā ‘alaihim ḥijāratam min sijjīl(in).
verse.verse_79: Fantaqamnā minhum, wa innahumā labi'imāmim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_81: Wa ātaināhum āyātinā fa kānū ‘anhā mu‘riḍīn(a).
verse.verse_82: Wa kānū yanḥitūna minal-jibāli buyūtan āminīn(a).
verse.verse_85: Wa mā khalaqnas-samāwāti wal-arḍa  wa mā bainahumā illā bil-ḥaqq(i), wa innas-sā‘ata la'ātiyatun faṣfaḥiṣ-ṣafḥal-jamīl(a).
verse.verse_87: Wa laqad ātaināka sab‘am minal-maṡānī wal-qur'ānal-‘aẓīm(a).
verse.verse_88: Lā tamuddanna ‘ainaika ilā mā matta‘nā bihī azwājam minhum wa lā taḥzan ‘alaihim wakhfiḍ janāḥaka lil-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_96: Allażīna yaj‘alūna ma‘allāhi ilāhan ākhar(a), fa saufa ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_97: Wa laqad na‘lamu annaka yaḍīqu ṣadruka bimā yaqūlūn(a).
verse.verse_98: Fa sabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika wa kum minas-sājidīn(a).
